zh.lifeSummary: 當Patrick de Chaworth於大約1220年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德時，他的父親Payne de Chaworth37歲，母親Gundred de la Ferte21歲。他於1243年12月19日之前與Hawise de London在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1258年9月23日在威爾士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Patrick de Chaworth于大约1220年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾肯普斯福德时，他的父亲Payne de Chaworth37岁，母亲Gundred de la Ferte21岁。他于1243年12月19日之前与Hawise de London在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1258年9月23日在威尔士卡馬特史爾吉德維爾利享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chaworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Haworth (Yorkshire), probably from Old English haga ‘hedge, enclosure’ + worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Howarth
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Howarth in Rochdale (Lancashire), possibly from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + worth ‘enclosure’. The name may have been confused with Haworth .

nameMeanings.name: Patrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Patrick de Chaworth was born about 1220, in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, his father, Payne de Chaworth, was 37 and his mother, Gundred de la Ferte, was 21. He married Hawise de London before 19 December 1243, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 September 1258, in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Patrick de Chaworth est né environ 1220, à Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Payne de Chaworth, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Gundred de la Ferte, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Hawise de London avant 19 décembre 1243, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1258, à Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Patrick de Chaworth um 1220 in Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Payne de Chaworth 37 und seine Mutter Gundred de la Ferte 21. Er hat vor 19. Dezember 1243 in England, United Kingdom Hawise de London geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. September 1258 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick de Chaworth è nato il circa 1220 nel Kempsford, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, Payne de Chaworth, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Gundred de la Ferte, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Hawise de London prima del 19 dicembre 1243, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 settembre 1258, nel Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Galles, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Patrick de Chaworthが約1220年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアケンプスフォードで生まれた時，父Payne de Chaworthは37歳，母Gundred de la Ferteは21歳であった。1243年12月19日以前にイギリスイギリスでHawise de Londonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1258年9月23日にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアキドウエリーで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Patrick de Chaworth(이)가 대략 1220년 영국 그루스스터실르 케프스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Payne de Chaworth(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Gundred de la Ferte(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1243년 12월 19일 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Hawise de London(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1258년 9월 23일 웨일스 카마테실르 키드웰이에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Patrick de Chaworth nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Kempsford, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Payne de Chaworth, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Gundred de la Ferte, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Hawise de London antes 19 de dezembro de 1243, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1258, em Kidwelly, Carmarthenshire, Gales, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Patrick de Chaworth родился около 1220 г. в местности кемпсфорд, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Payne de Chaworth было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Gundred de la Ferte, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Hawise de London перед 19 декабрь 1243 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 сентября 1258 г. в местности кидвелли, кармартеншир, Уэльс в возрасте 39 лет.

Se casó con Hawise de London antes de 19 de diciembre de 1243, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas.
